series_metadata.series_title: Employee Conflict of Interest Tracking Database
series_metadata.series_description: Information collected on Ohio Attorney General's Office employees to identify any potential conflicts of interest concerning matters handled by the office in the spirit of the Ohio Rules of Professional Conduct. Information includes, but is not limited to, spousal/relative's information, past employment history, case history, and other state involvements.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: information no longer of use conflict check or 90 days employee separates from office, whichever occurs first
